channel.title: Upcoming Frontity Talks in September
channel.description:
There are many talks about Frontity this month. Mark your calendars! All the following events are online and free.
This Saturday our co-founder @Pablo is speaking at WordCamp Colombia about React frontends for WordPress with Frontity:
* **12 September** at 9:00h – Time in Colombia (GMT-5). * This event will be held in Spanish. 🇨🇴
More information: https://colombia.wordcamp.org/2020/session/frontends-en-react-para-wordpress-introduccion-a-frontity/
The same day, the community member @rbarbosaribeiro is hosting a session this Saturday on How to create WordPress themes using Frontity at WordCamp São Paulo:
* **12 September** at 14:50h – Time in São Paulo (GMT-3). * This event will be held in Portuguese. 🇧🇷
More information: https://saopaulo.wordcamp.org/2020/session/criando-temas-para-wordpress-usando-frontity/
Next week, [Alex Cuadra](https://twitter.com/alexcuadr4) is giving a talk on how to get started with Frontity at the Managua WordPress Meetup:
* **16 September** at 18:00h – Time in Nicaragua (GMT-6). * This meetup will be in Spanish. 🇳🇮
More information: https://www.meetup.com/es/Managua-WordPress-Meetup/events/273137494/
And later this month, @riggio.francesco will be talking about his experience with the framework at the Piacenza WordPress Meetup:
* **29 September** at 18:30h – Time in Italy (GMT+2) * This meetup will be in Italian. 🇮🇹
More information: https://www.meetup.com/it-IT/Piacenza-WordPress-Meetup/events/273092937/
Our DevRel team member @mburridge is giving another session in **English** by the end of September but is yet to be announced. Stay tuned for more details.
If you're giving a talk about Frontity at other conference or know about any other event, please feel free to add it to the list. Thanks! :)

item.title: Upcoming Frontity Talks in September
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
Today, our DevRel team member @mburridge is speaking about Frontity at the WordPress London Meetup.

  • 24 September
  • 18:30 (GMT+1)

Here’s more information:

Meetup

WordPress London Meetup - September 2020

Thu, Sep 24, 2020, 6:30 PM: 🎙 Virtual #WPLDNThe event will be delivered via https://live.bigorangeheart.org/. Access to this platform will be made available from 30-minutes before the event is schedu

Hope to see you there!

Read full topic

item.title: Upcoming Frontity Talks in September
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
There are many talks about Frontity this month. Mark your calendars! All the following events are online and free.

This Saturday our co-founder @Pablo is speaking at WordCamp Colombia about React frontends for WordPress with Frontity:

  • 12 September at 9:00h – Time in Colombia (GMT-5).
  • This event will be held in Spanish.

More information:

WordCamp Colombia 2020 – 17 Aug 20

React frontends para WordPress con Frontity

En esta ponencia Pablo Postigo, co-fundador y CEO de Frontity, dará una introducción a los fundamentos para el uso de WordPress como un Headless CMS y cómo utilizar React en el Frontend. Esta arqui…

The same day, the community member @rbarbosaribeiro is hosting a session this Saturday on How to create WordPress themes using Frontity at WordCamp São Paulo:

  • 12 September at 14:50h – Time in São Paulo (GMT-3).
  • This event will be held in Portuguese.

More information:

WordCamp São Paulo – 1 Sep 20

Criando temas para WordPress usando Frontity

Na palestra, o desenvolvedor de software e product manager Rodrigo (Digo) Ribeiro criará – a partir do framework Frontity – um tema simples em WordPress.

Next week, Alex Cuadra is giving a talk on how to get started with Frontity at the Managua WordPress Meetup:

  • 16 September at 18:00h – Time in Nicaragua (GMT-6).
  • This meetup will be in Spanish.

More information:

Meetup

Miercoles de Web: Aplicaciones móviles de WordPress & Frontity

mié., 16 sept. 2020 18:00: Una vez más nos reunimos para compartir conocimiento y un rato ameno, en esta ocasión tendremos una sesión especial de aplicaciones móviles WordPress y Frontity que no te po

And later this month, @riggio.francesco will be talking about his experience with the framework at the Piacenza WordPress Meetup:

  • 29 September at 18:30h – Time in Italy (GMT+2)
  • This meetup will be in Italian.

More information:

Meetup

Piacenza WordPress Meetup #19 ONLINE - Frontity React framework + Aree Riservate

mar 29 set 2020, 18:30: Programma del 19° MeetUp ONLINE del gruppo WordPress Piacenza.29 settembre 2020Esclusivamente tramite invito Google Meet che verrà reso noto dopo questa registrazione gratuita

Our DevRel team member @mburridge is giving another session in English by the end of September but is yet to be announced. Stay tuned for more details.

If you’re giving a talk about Frontity at other conference or know about any other event, please feel free to add it to the list. Thanks!

Read full topic
